productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Printed Olive Top
description: Composition Olive green round neck top made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with mid-arm button and graphic print Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroidery Your weekend wear has a new twist with this united colors of benetton's t-shirt. Layer this tee with a structured light hued jacket, classic form-fitting denims and casual shoes. Wear it with colourful canvas shoes for Kristen Stewart-esque quirk or closed toe kitten heels. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
